dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal requires capturing fast momentum moves with high threshold. Translated 'momentum exceeds high threshold' to macd_hist > 0 (bullish) or < 0 (bearish) combined with adx_14 > 40 (strong trend strength). Exit on momentum reversal. High threshold approximated at ADX > 40 for strong directional moves. Hold duration set to 1 day max to capture 'small window of opportunity' characteristic. MACD histogram used as momentum proxy per allowed indicators list.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal requires capturing fast momentum moves with high threshold. Translated 'momentum exceeds high threshold' to macd_hist > 0 (bullish) or < 0 (bearish) combined with adx_14 > 40 (strong trend strength). Exit on momentum reversal. High threshold approximated at ADX > 40 for strong directional moves. Hold duration set to 1 day max to capture 'small window of opportunity' characteristic. MACD histogram used as momentum proxy per allowed indicators list.

source_rule_text: Trade in the direction of the price move only when momentum exceeds a high threshold level, capturing the small window of opportunity when prices are moving fast.
